groups.thesis: Sector under pressure with avg YTD return of -9.3%. Weak breadth — just 0/5 stocks outperforming S&P 500. 80% of stocks above 50-day MA, confirming uptrend. Healthy momentum (avg RSI 58).
groups.thesis_breaker: S&P 500 correction below 6452 (10% off 7169 high). Momentum breakdown if avg RSI drops below 40 (currently 58). Trend reversal if >50% of stocks break below 50-day MA (currently 20% below). Group leadership fragile (avg YTD -9.3%), at risk of turning negative.
